tools.name: audit_scan_contract
tools.description: Scan Solidity source code for vulnerabilities. Performs pattern-based detection of reentrancy, access control, overflow, unchecked returns, front-running, oracle manipulation, flash loan, logic errors, and centralization issues.

tools.name: audit_get_security_score
tools.description: Calculate a security score (0-100) for Solidity source code with detailed breakdown by severity.

tools.name: audit_check_reentrancy
tools.description: Check Solidity source code specifically for reentrancy vulnerabilities including cross-function reentrancy.

tools.name: audit_check_access_control
tools.description: Analyze Solidity source code for access control issues: unprotected selfdestruct, missing access control on sensitive functions, tx.origin misuse.

tools.name: audit_analyze_gas
tools.description: Analyze Solidity source code for gas optimization opportunities including storage patterns, loop optimization, packing, and visibility improvements.

tools.name: audit_verify_contract
tools.description: Check if a contract address is verified on a block explorer (Etherscan and compatible explorers).

tools.name: audit_get_audit_report
tools.description: Generate a comprehensive audit report including vulnerability scan, gas analysis, security score, and function analysis.

tools.name: audit_list_audits
tools.description: List previous audits with optional filters by contract ID, status, and pagination.

tools.name: audit_compare_contracts
tools.description: Compare two versions of a contract to identify security improvements or regressions.

source_a.description: Source code of the first (older) version

source_b.description: Source code of the second (newer) version

tools.name: audit_check_upgradability
tools.description: Analyze Solidity source code for proxy and upgradability patterns including transparent proxy, UUPS, and beacon patterns.

tools.name: audit_get_known_vulnerabilities
tools.description: Check contract source code against a database of known vulnerability patterns (SWC registry).

tools.name: audit_analyze_dependencies
tools.description: Analyze import statements and library dependencies in Solidity source code for potential security concerns.

tools.name: audit_generate_findings
tools.description: Generate a structured findings document in a standard audit report format, suitable for sharing with development teams.

auditor.description: Name of the auditor or team

tools.name: audit_status
tools.description: System health and configuration status: version info, configured providers, database connection, and settings.

tools.name: lucid_audit
tools.description: Deep security audit of a Solidity contract. Runs all 9 vulnerability detectors + 6 gas analyzers and returns a structured AuditResult with verdict (SAFE / CAUTION / RISKY / CRITICAL), score (0-100), grade (A-F), top vulnerabilities, gas analysis, and risk factors.

chain.description: Chain the contract is deployed on (ethereum, bsc, polygon, etc.)

detail.description: Detail level: full includes all vulnerabilities and gas details, compact omits them

tools.name: lucid_audit_compare
tools.description: Compare two contract versions to identify fixed, new, and persistent security issues. Shows score delta and overall trend (IMPROVED / REGRESSED / UNCHANGED).

source_a.description: Source code of the first (older) version

source_b.description: Source code of the second (newer) version

tools.name: lucid_audit_batch
tools.description: Batch scan multiple contracts and return aggregate scores, verdicts, and finding counts. Identifies the worst contract in the set.

contracts.description: Array of {source, name} objects representing contracts to scan

tools.name: lucid_gas
tools.description: Focused gas optimization analysis of Solidity source code. Detects storage inefficiencies, loop issues, packing problems, visibility improvements, and more. Returns structured results with estimated savings per issue.

tools.name: lucid_audit_pro
tools.description: Direct access to individual vulnerability detectors and gas analyzers. Use list_tools to see available tools, or call one directly with source_code in params.

tool.description: Tool name or "list_tools" to see available tools

tools.name: bridge_create_workflow
tools.description: Create an automation workflow with a trigger platform/event and one or more actions across platforms.

trigger_event.description: Event that triggers the workflow (e.g., issue_created, pr_opened, message_posted)

items.description: Action definition with platform, action type, and params

tools.name: bridge_list_workflows
tools.description: List automation workflows with optional status filter.

tools.name: bridge_run_workflow
tools.description: Execute a workflow manually by providing a workflow ID and optional trigger data.

workflow_id.description: ID of the workflow to execute

trigger_data.description: Data to pass as trigger context

tools.name: bridge_create_connection
tools.description: Set up a platform connection (Slack, GitHub, Notion, Linear, Jira, etc.).

tools.name: bridge_list_connections
tools.description: List configured platform connections with their status.

tools.name: bridge_sync_data
tools.description: Sync data between two platforms. Creates a sync mapping and performs the sync.

mapping_id.description: Existing mapping ID to sync (if re-syncing)

tools.name: bridge_get_logs
tools.description: Get workflow execution and sync logs, optionally filtered by mapping.

mapping_id.description: Filter logs by sync mapping ID

limit.description: Maximum number of logs to return

tools.name: bridge_create_webhook
tools.description: Create an incoming webhook endpoint for triggering workflows from external sources.

event.description: Event type this webhook listens for

workflow_id.description: Workflow to trigger when webhook is called

tools.name: bridge_transform_data
tools.description: Transform data between platform formats (e.g., Linear issue to GitHub issue, Notion page to Jira task).

target_platform.description: Platform to transform the data for

tools.name: bridge_schedule_workflow
tools.description: Schedule a workflow for recurring execution using a cron expression.

workflow_id.description: ID of the workflow to schedule

schedule.description: Cron expression for schedule (e.g., "*/30 * * * *" for every 30 minutes)

enabled.description: Whether to enable or disable the schedule

tools.name: bridge_get_metrics
tools.description: Get workflow execution metrics, sync stats, and overall system statistics.

tools.name: bridge_status
tools.description: System health and status: connected platforms, configuration, and uptime info.

tools.name: compete_add_competitor
tools.description: Add a new competitor to track. Automatically discovers monitorable endpoints (pricing pages, RSS feeds).

description.description: A brief description of the competitor

industry.description: The industry the competitor operates in

tools.name: compete_list_competitors
tools.description: List all tracked competitors, optionally filtered by industry.

tools.name: compete_update_competitor
tools.description: Update an existing competitor's details.

tools.name: compete_remove_competitor
tools.description: Remove a competitor and all associated monitors and signals (cascading delete).

tools.name: compete_add_monitor
tools.description: Add a new monitor to track a specific source for a competitor.

competitor_id.description: The competitor ID this monitor belongs to

enabled.description: Whether the monitor is enabled (default: true)

tools.name: compete_list_monitors
tools.description: List monitors, optionally filtered by competitor or enabled status.

tools.name: compete_remove_monitor
tools.description: Remove a monitor by ID.

tools.name: compete_fetch_now
tools.description: Fetch the latest data from monitors immediately. Can target a specific monitor, all monitors for a competitor, or all enabled monitors.

competitor_id.description: Fetch all monitors for this competitor

tools.name: compete_list_signals
tools.description: List competitive signals with optional filters by competitor, severity, type, and date range.

limit.description: Maximum number of signals to return (default: 50)

days_back.description: Only show signals from the last N days (default: 30)

tools.name: compete_generate_battlecard
tools.description: Generate a competitive battlecard for a specific competitor based on recent signals.

competitor_id.description: The competitor ID to generate a battlecard for

days_back.description: Number of days of signal history to include (default: 30)

tools.name: compete_generate_brief
tools.description: Generate a competitive intelligence brief (weekly or monthly) summarizing recent signals across all competitors.

brief_type.description: The type of brief to generate

date.description: The date for the brief (YYYY-MM-DD, defaults to today)

tools.name: compete_search
tools.description: Full-text search across all competitive signals (title, summary, content).

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return (default: 20)

tools.name: compete_status
tools.description: Get an overview of the competitive intelligence system: competitor count, monitor count, signal counts by severity, and last fetch time.

tools.name: feedback_submit
tools.description: Submit a new feedback entry. Automatically analyzes sentiment, categorizes content, and assigns priority if not provided.

tags.description: Tags to attach to the feedback

tools.name: feedback_list
tools.description: List feedback entries with optional filters by channel, sentiment, category, status, priority, or search query.

tools.name: feedback_analyze_sentiment
tools.description: Analyze the sentiment of a feedback text. Returns sentiment label (positive/negative/neutral), confidence score, detected keywords, category, and urgency.

text.description: The text to analyze for sentiment

tools.name: feedback_get_nps
tools.description: Calculate the Net Promoter Score (NPS) with breakdown of promoters, passives, and detractors. Optionally filter by time period.

days.description: Number of days to look back (default: all time)

tools.name: feedback_get_csat
tools.description: Calculate the Customer Satisfaction (CSAT) score over a time period. CSAT is the percentage of ratings that are 4 or 5 out of 5.

days.description: Number of days to look back (default: 30)

tools.name: feedback_track_feature_request
tools.description: Create a new feature request or update an existing feedback item to mark it as a feature request. Assigns priority based on content analysis.

feedback_id.description: Existing feedback ID to convert to a feature request

tools.name: feedback_list_feature_requests
tools.description: List feature requests extracted from feedback, ranked by priority and frequency. Helps product teams identify the most-requested features.

tools.name: feedback_get_trends
tools.description: Analyze feedback trends over time. Detects volume changes, sentiment shifts, and anomalies. Groups data by day, week, or month.

tools.name: feedback_categorize
tools.description: Auto-categorize feedback text by topic/type. Can also update an existing feedback item with the detected category.

feedback_id.description: Existing feedback ID to categorize and update

tools.name: feedback_get_insights
tools.description: Generate AI-ready structured insights from the entire feedback corpus. Combines NPS, themes, trends, and feature requests into a comprehensive summary.

tools.name: feedback_create_survey
tools.description: Create a new feedback survey with customizable questions. Supports text, rating, NPS, and multiple choice question types.

questions.description: Array of questions, each with id, text, type, and optional options

tools.name: feedback_status
tools.description: System health and statistics: total feedback count, survey count, response count, configuration status, and scheduler info.

tools.name: hype_create_campaign
tools.description: Create a new marketing campaign with goals, target platforms, and scheduling. Campaigns group posts and track performance.

tools.name: hype_track_post
tools.description: Track a social media post by recording its URL, platform, content, and initial metrics.

tools.name: hype_get_virality_score
tools.description: Calculate a virality score (0-100) for content based on engagement velocity, share ratio, comment depth, and amplification.

tools.name: hype_analyze_engagement
tools.description: Analyze engagement patterns for a set of posts. Returns best posting times, audience segments, sentiment analysis, and top content types.

posts.description: Array of post data objects with metrics

tools.name: hype_optimize_content
tools.description: Analyze content and provide optimization suggestions for a specific platform. Scores length, hashtags, readability, CTA, and more.

tools.name: hype_find_influencers
tools.description: Find relevant influencers by platform, niche, and minimum follower count from the tracked influencer database.

tools.name: hype_rank_influencers
tools.description: Rank a list of influencers by composite score based on engagement rate, audience quality, relevance, follower count, and post frequency.

influencers.description: Array of influencer profiles to rank

tools.name: hype_get_best_times
tools.description: Get best posting times by platform. Returns day-of-week and hour (UTC) with expected engagement scores.

tools.name: hype_get_campaign_report
tools.description: Generate a comprehensive performance report for a campaign including total engagement, impressions, virality, and recommendations.

tools.name: hype_list_campaigns
tools.description: List campaigns with optional filters for status and platform.

tools.name: hype_get_trending_topics
tools.description: Get trending topics by platform with velocity scores, volume, and sentiment data.

query.description: Optional search query to filter topics

tools.name: hype_analyze_competitor
tools.description: Analyze a competitor's social media presence. Provides follower counts, engagement rates, content themes, strengths, and weaknesses.

tools.name: hype_get_content_calendar
tools.description: Generate a content calendar with suggested topics, platforms, content types, and posting times for the next 7 days.

tools.name: hype_status
tools.description: System health and statistics: plugin version, configuration status, and connected platforms.

tools.name: invoice_create_client
tools.description: Create a new client for invoicing. Provide name, email, optional company, address, tax ID, and payment terms (net days).

tools.name: invoice_create_invoice
tools.description: Create a new invoice for a client. Provide client_id, line items (description, quantity, unit_price), optional tax_rate, discount, currency, and notes.

tools.name: invoice_send_invoice
tools.description: Mark an invoice as sent. In production, this would trigger email delivery to the client.

tools.name: invoice_record_payment
tools.description: Record a payment against an invoice. Provide invoice_id, amount, payment method, and optional reference number.

tools.name: invoice_get_outstanding
tools.description: Get all outstanding (unpaid) invoices and total amounts. Optionally filter by client_id.

tools.name: invoice_create_subscription
tools.description: Create a recurring subscription for a client. Provide client_id, plan name, amount, currency, and billing cycle.

tools.name: invoice_get_revenue
tools.description: Get revenue analytics including MRR, ARR, and growth metrics. Specify period granularity and optional date range.

tools.name: invoice_manage_clients
tools.description: Manage clients: list all, get by ID, or update client details. Actions: list, get, update.

tools.name: invoice_get_aging_report
tools.description: Generate an accounts receivable aging report showing outstanding invoices bucketed by current, 1-30, 31-60, 61-90, and 90+ days.

tools.name: invoice_forecast_revenue
tools.description: Forecast revenue for the next N months based on current subscriptions and optional monthly growth rate (%).

tools.name: invoice_status
tools.description: Check Lucid Invoice system health and configuration status.

tools.name: meet_analyze_transcript
tools.description: Analyze a meeting transcript to extract key topics, decisions, action items, and sentiment. Provide either a meeting_id (to analyze stored transcript) or raw transcript text.

meeting_id.description: ID of the meeting whose transcript to analyze

transcript.description: Raw transcript text to analyze (used if meeting_id not provided)

tools.name: meet_extract_action_items
tools.description: Extract action items from a meeting transcript with assignees, deadlines, and priority levels. Optionally saves them to the database.

meeting_id.description: Meeting ID whose transcript to parse

transcript.description: Raw transcript text (used if meeting_id not provided)

save.description: Whether to save extracted items to the database (default: false)

tools.name: meet_create_summary
tools.description: Generate a structured meeting summary including key topics, decisions, action items, attendees, and sentiment.

meeting_id.description: ID of the meeting to summarize

tools.name: meet_track_followup
tools.description: Track follow-up items and their completion status. Create new follow-ups, list pending ones, or mark them complete.

action.description: Action to perform: create, list, or complete a follow-up

meeting_id.description: Filter by meeting ID (for list action)

scheduled_for.description: ISO date for when to send follow-up (for create action)

tools.name: meet_list_meetings
tools.description: List meetings with optional filters by type, status, date range. Returns a formatted list of meetings.

since.description: Filter meetings scheduled after this ISO date

limit.description: Maximum number of meetings to return (default: 20)

tools.name: meet_search_meetings
tools.description: Search across meeting transcripts, summaries, and titles for a keyword or phrase. Returns matching meetings with context snippets.

query.description: Search query to match against meeting content

tools.name: meet_get_participant_stats
tools.description: Get speaking time and contribution metrics per participant in a meeting. Analyzes transcript for line count, word count, and assigned action items.

meeting_id.description: Meeting ID to analyze participant stats for

tools.name: meet_detect_sentiment
tools.description: Analyze the sentiment of a meeting, both overall and per section/topic. Identifies positive, negative, neutral, and mixed tones.

transcript.description: Raw transcript text (used if meeting_id not provided)

tools.name: meet_generate_agenda
tools.description: Generate a meeting agenda based on meeting type, participants, and context from previous meetings and pending action items.

type.description: Type of meeting to generate agenda for

include_carryover.description: Include pending action items from recent meetings (default: true)

tools.name: meet_create_meeting
tools.description: Create a new meeting entry in the system. Provide title, type, date, attendees, and optionally transcript/recording URL.

scheduled_at.description: ISO date when the meeting is scheduled (defaults to now)

tools.name: meet_get_insights
tools.description: Get meeting insights including patterns, frequency, productivity metrics, action item completion rates, and bottleneck analysis.

tools.name: meet_status
tools.description: System health and statistics: meeting count, action items, follow-ups, provider status, and configuration info.

tools.name: metrics_track_event
tools.description: Track a product analytics event. Ingests events like page views, clicks, purchases, signups, and custom events into the analytics database.

user_id.description: User ID associated with the event

tools.name: metrics_query_metric
tools.description: Query a product metric by name. Returns time series data, aggregated value, and growth rate. Queries configured analytics providers or local database.

metric_name.description: Name of the metric to query

period.description: Time period granularity for the time series

tools.name: metrics_analyze_funnel
tools.description: Analyze a conversion funnel. Shows step-by-step conversion rates, drop-off rates, and identifies the bottleneck step. Can use saved funnels or ad-hoc step definitions.

funnel_name.description: Name of a saved funnel definition to analyze

tools.name: metrics_get_retention
tools.description: Get retention cohort analysis. Shows how well users are retained over time after a specific entry event, with churn point identification.

entry_event.description: The event that defines cohort entry (e.g. "signup")

return_event.description: The event that defines a return (defaults to any event)

tools.name: metrics_get_active_users
tools.description: Get active user counts (DAU, WAU, or MAU) with growth rates compared to the previous period.

tools.name: metrics_analyze_experiment
tools.description: Analyze an A/B test experiment. Performs statistical significance testing, determines winner, and provides confidence intervals and lift metrics.

tools.name: metrics_track_feature
tools.description: Create or update a feature for adoption tracking. Set feature status and description to monitor feature lifecycle.

feature_name.description: Name of the feature to track

tools.name: metrics_get_feature_adoption
tools.description: Get feature adoption metrics including adoption rate, unique users, and time-to-adopt analysis for a specific feature.

feature_name.description: Name of the feature to analyze

tools.name: metrics_create_dashboard
tools.description: Create or replace a dashboard with multiple widgets. Each widget can be a line chart, bar chart, pie chart, funnel, cohort, or heatmap.

tools.name: metrics_get_insights
tools.description: Get AI-ready product analytics insights. Analyzes trends, anomalies, and provides actionable recommendations for the specified period.

tools.name: metrics_compare_periods
tools.description: Compare a metric across two time periods. Shows values, growth rates, and highlights changes between period A and period B.

metric_name.description: Name of the metric to compare

tools.name: metrics_status
tools.description: System health and statistics: event count, metric definitions, provider status, and configuration overview.

tools.name: lucid_triage
tools.description: Analyze a Sentry issue for severity, temporal pattern, and root cause diagnosis. Combines severity scoring, pattern detection, and keyword matching into a structured triage result.

timestamps.description: Array of event timestamps (ms) for temporal analysis

tools.name: lucid_readiness
tools.description: Check production readiness of a service by validating environment variables against the observability checklist. Returns a score, pass/warn/fail per variable, and critical failures.

env_vars.description: Environment variables to check (key/value pairs). Keys: SENTRY_DSN, SENTRY_AUTH_TOKEN, OTEL_ENABLED, OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT, OTEL_HASH_SALT, OPENMETER_ENABLED, OPENMETER_API_KEY, DATABASE_URL, LUCID_ENV

tools.name: lucid_outbox_health
tools.description: Analyze OpenMeter outbox health from queue statistics. Applies thresholds to detect queue backup, dead letters, stuck leases, and zero throughput.

tools.name: lucid_diagnose
tools.description: Pattern-match an error title, culprit, and stack trace against 12 known diagnosis categories (litellm_timeout, openmeter_timeout, privy_auth, mcp_server_down, network_error, timeout, auth_error, rate_limit, database_error, validation_error, memory_leak, application_error).

tools.name: lucid_obs_pro
tools.description: Direct access to observability analysis functions. Use list_tools to see available tools, or call one directly.

tools.name: lucid_evaluate
tools.description: Evaluate a prediction market for edge and optimal position sizing. Combines EV analysis, Kelly criterion, market efficiency, and time decay into a structured verdict (BUY_YES / BUY_NO / SKIP / HEDGE).

query.description: Market to evaluate (title, URL, or search query)

probability.description: Your estimated true probability (0-1). Omit to use market price.

tools.name: lucid_discover
tools.description: Scan prediction markets across all platforms to discover edge opportunities. Filters by minimum edge threshold and returns sorted by score.

tools.name: lucid_arbitrage
tools.description: Detect cross-platform arbitrage opportunities by matching similar markets across Polymarket, Manifold, and Kalshi, then calculating price spreads.

tools.name: lucid_correlate
tools.description: [COMING SOON] Find correlated prediction markets where one has resolved but the related market hasn't adjusted its price yet — exploiting correlation lag.

tools.name: lucid_size
tools.description: Calculate optimal position sizes for a portfolio of prediction market positions using Kelly criterion with correlation adjustments.

tools.name: lucid_calibrate
tools.description: Analyze your prediction calibration using Brier score, calibration curve, and overconfidence detection. Provide an array of past forecasts with outcomes.

tools.name: lucid_pro
tools.description: Direct access to prediction market math functions and platform adapters. Use list_tools to see available tools, or call one directly.

tools.name: propose_create_proposal
tools.description: Create a new proposal. Optionally use a template to pre-populate sections. Returns the created proposal with its ID.

tools.name: propose_analyze_rfp
tools.description: Analyze RFP (Request for Proposal) content to extract requirements, evaluation criteria, deadlines, budget hints, and key themes. Provides structured analysis to guide proposal creation.

tools.name: propose_generate_section
tools.description: Generate an AI-ready prompt for a specific proposal section. Returns a detailed prompt that can be used to generate section content, incorporating the proposal context and company information.

tools.name: propose_score_proposal
tools.description: Score a proposal on completeness, clarity, pricing alignment, and compliance. Returns a total score (0-100) with a detailed breakdown and actionable improvement suggestions.

tools.name: propose_manage_templates
tools.description: Manage proposal templates: create, list, get, or update templates. Templates provide reusable section structures for consistent proposal creation.

tools.name: propose_search_content
tools.description: Search reusable content blocks for proposals. Find pre-written content snippets by keyword or category to accelerate proposal writing.

tools.name: propose_calculate_pricing
tools.description: Calculate pricing breakdown based on the specified model (fixed, hourly, retainer, milestone, value_based, subscription). Provide relevant parameters for each model type.

tools.name: propose_get_analytics
tools.description: Get analytics data for proposals. If proposal_id is provided, returns events for that specific proposal. Otherwise returns aggregate analytics including win rates, average deal size, and pipeline value.

tools.name: propose_compare_proposals
tools.description: Compare multiple proposals side-by-side. Provides scoring, value comparison, and identifies the strongest proposal across multiple dimensions.

tools.name: propose_status
tools.description: Check the health and configuration status of the Lucid Propose plugin. Returns plugin info, configuration state, and connectivity status.

tools.name: lucid-prospect__prospect_find_leads
tools.description: Search for leads across all configured providers (Apollo, Hunter, Clearbit, Crunchbase). Returns deduplicated results with contact details and stores them in the database.

query.description: Search query (e.g., "marketing managers at SaaS companies")

title.description: Filter by job title (e.g., "VP of Sales")

tools.name: lucid-prospect__prospect_enrich_lead
tools.description: Enrich a lead by email using all available providers (Apollo, Hunter, Clearbit). Merges data from multiple sources and updates the database.

email.description: Email address of the lead to enrich

tools.name: lucid-prospect__prospect_enrich_company
tools.description: Enrich a company by domain using all available providers (Apollo, Clearbit, Crunchbase). Returns comprehensive company profile including funding, tech stack, and employee data.

tools.name: lucid-prospect__prospect_find_emails
tools.description: Find email addresses at a company domain using Hunter.io and Apollo. Optionally filter by name. Verifies emails when possible.

tools.name: lucid-prospect__prospect_verify_email
tools.description: Verify an email address using Hunter.io or other configured providers. Checks MX records, SMTP, catch-all, and disposable status.

tools.name: lucid-prospect__prospect_build_list
tools.description: Create a targeted lead list (campaign) from ICP criteria. Automatically finds matching leads in the database and optionally triggers enrichment.

auto_enrich.description: Auto-enrich leads that lack enrichment data

tools.name: lucid-prospect__prospect_score_leads
tools.description: Score all leads (or campaign-specific leads) using multi-factor scoring: email quality (30%), title relevance (25%), company fit (25%), engagement (10%), recency (10%). Updates scores in the database.

campaign_id.description: Score only leads in this campaign

min_score.description: Only return leads above this score

rescore.description: Re-score all leads even if already scored

tools.name: lucid-prospect__prospect_find_companies
tools.description: Search for companies in the database matching criteria like industry, employee count, and keywords.

query.description: Search query for company name, domain, or description

tools.name: lucid-prospect__prospect_get_icp_match
tools.description: Calculate how well a lead (by email) or company (by domain) matches your Ideal Customer Profile. Returns a score (0-100) with detailed breakdown.

email_or_domain.description: Email address (for lead) or domain (for company) to match against ICP

icp.description: ICP criteria to match against. If not provided, uses default criteria.

tools.name: lucid-prospect__prospect_export_leads
tools.description: Export leads in CSV, JSON, or Markdown format. Filter by campaign, minimum score, or status.

campaign_id.description: Export only leads from this campaign

tools.name: lucid-prospect__prospect_manage_campaign
tools.description: Create, update, list, or get campaigns/lead lists. Campaigns organize leads for targeted outreach.

tools.name: lucid-prospect__prospect_get_insights
tools.description: Get analytics and insights about your lead pipeline: conversion rates, lead flow, top sources, score distributions, and more.

campaign_id.description: Filter insights to a specific campaign

tools.name: lucid-prospect__prospect_search_prospects
tools.description: Full-text search across leads and companies in the database. Search by name, email, company, domain, title, or description.

tools.name: lucid-prospect__prospect_get_lead_research
tools.description: Generate AI-ready research data about a lead including their profile, company details, enrichment data, and suggested talking points. Returns structured prompt data for further AI analysis.

email.description: Email of the lead to research

tools.name: lucid-prospect__prospect_status
tools.description: Get system health and status: lead count, company count, configured providers, enrichment statistics, and configuration summary.

tools.name: quantum_fleet
tools.description: Get GPU fleet status: active/offline workers, throughput, mode progress, and recommendations. Use this to understand the current state of the distributed key search operation.

tools.name: quantum_triage
tools.description: Classify target Bitcoin addresses with vulnerability scoring per weak key mode. Returns heuristic probabilities, temporal narrowing opportunities, and top targets. This is the primary intelligence tool for understanding which addresses are most crackable.

tools.name: quantum_fingerprint
tools.description: Analyze wallet software fingerprint for a target address based on transaction patterns (nLockTime, tx_version, output ordering, sequence). Returns identified wallet software, confidence score, and probable vulnerable key generation modes.

tools.name: quantum_optimize
tools.description: Automatically optimize GPU mode priority weights by aggregating target triage scores and wallet fingerprint data. This is THE key intelligence tool — it bridges the gap between analysis (what we know about targets) and action (where GPUs spend time). Call after triage and fingerprinting to apply the intelligence.

tools.name: quantum_narrow
tools.description: Compute temporally narrowed search ranges for a target. Uses the first on-chain appearance timestamp to constrain timestamp-seeded modes to a 7-day window, reducing keyspace by up to 99% (300x speedup). Essential for efficient search.

tools.name: quantum_brain
tools.description: Evaluate brain wallet passphrase strategy performance. Shows hit rates per strategy, trends, and recommendations for which strategies to scale up or retire.

tools.name: quantum_cost
tools.description: Analyze GPU cost efficiency per search mode. Shows cost per billion keys, GPU time spent, and estimated time remaining. Use this to identify which modes are consuming disproportionate resources.

tools.name: quantum_protect
tools.description: Run comprehensive fleet health checks: worker connectivity, mode progress stalls, canary verification, and resource utilization. Returns risk level and actionable alerts.

tools.name: quantum_review
tools.description: Review fleet performance over time. Shows keys checked, modes completed, matches found, worker uptime, and suggestions for improving search efficiency.

tools.name: recruit_create_job
tools.description: Create a new job posting with title, description, requirements, and compensation details.

tools.name: recruit_search_candidates
tools.description: Search candidates by query, skills, experience level, and location.

tools.name: recruit_add_candidate
tools.description: Add a new candidate to the system.

tools.name: recruit_screen_candidate
tools.description: AI screen a candidate against a job posting, producing a score and breakdown.

tools.name: recruit_move_stage
tools.description: Move a candidate application to a new pipeline stage.

tools.name: recruit_add_evaluation
tools.description: Record an evaluation/feedback for a candidate application.

tools.name: recruit_schedule_interview
tools.description: Schedule an interview for a candidate application.

tools.name: recruit_get_pipeline
tools.description: Get pipeline overview with stage counts, conversion rates, and bottleneck analysis.

tools.name: recruit_get_candidate_profile
tools.description: Get full candidate profile including applications, evaluations, and scores.

tools.name: recruit_rank_candidates
tools.description: Rank candidates for a job by match score.

tools.name: recruit_get_job_analytics
tools.description: Get analytics for a job: time to hire, source effectiveness, stage conversion rates.

tools.name: recruit_bulk_screen
tools.description: Screen all unscreened applicants for a job.

tools.name: recruit_status
tools.description: Check Lucid Recruit system health and configuration status.

tools.name: seo_research_keywords
tools.description: Research keywords: get search volume, CPC, difficulty, intent classification, and related suggestions for a given keyword.

tools.name: seo_analyze_serp
tools.description: Analyze the SERP (Search Engine Results Page) for a keyword, returning top 10 results with positions, titles, descriptions, and SERP features.

tools.name: seo_track_rankings
tools.description: Track keyword rankings for a domain. Shows current positions, changes, and ranking trends.

domain.description: Your domain to track rankings for

tools.name: seo_analyze_backlinks
tools.description: Analyze the backlink profile of a domain: referring domains, total backlinks, authority scores, spam score, and top linking pages.

tools.name: seo_find_link_opportunities
tools.description: Find link building opportunities: unlinked mentions, broken link targets, and guest post prospects based on competitor backlink analysis.

domain.description: Your domain to find opportunities for

competitors.description: Competitor domains to analyze for link opportunities

tools.name: seo_audit_technical
tools.description: Run a technical SEO audit on a URL: checks meta tags, headings, images, links, structured data, mobile-friendliness, and returns a score with recommendations.

tools.name: seo_optimize_content
tools.description: Analyze and optimize content for SEO: readability score, keyword density, heading structure, meta tags, and actionable suggestions.

url.description: URL to fetch and analyze (optional if content provided)

content.description: HTML or text content to analyze

tools.name: seo_analyze_competitor
tools.description: Compare your domain against a competitor: keyword overlap, content gaps, authority comparison, and visibility differences.

tools.name: seo_get_content_brief
tools.description: Generate a comprehensive content brief for a keyword, including SERP analysis, recommended structure, target word count, and optimization tips.

tools.name: seo_find_content_gaps
tools.description: Discover content gaps: keywords your competitors rank for but your domain does not. Returns prioritized list with opportunity scores.

tools.name: seo_check_indexing
tools.description: Check indexing status of a domain or specific URLs. Reports which pages are indexed and potential indexing issues.

tools.name: seo_get_domain_overview
tools.description: Get a comprehensive domain overview: domain authority, backlinks, estimated organic traffic, top keywords, and competitive position.

tools.name: seo_generate_sitemap_analysis
tools.description: Analyze sitemap health for a domain: checks sitemap.xml accessibility, URL count, missing pages, and orphan page detection.

tools.name: seo_status
tools.description: System health and statistics: provider status, configuration, scheduler info, and database connectivity.

tools.name: tax_import_wallet
tools.description: Import a crypto wallet and fetch all its transactions. Supports Ethereum, Solana, BSC, Arbitrum, Base, Polygon, Avalanche, and Bitcoin.

tools.name: tax_classify_transactions
tools.description: Auto-classify transactions by type (swap, stake, bridge, airdrop, etc.) using on-chain data analysis.

wallet_id.description: Classify only transactions for this wallet

tools.name: tax_calculate_gains
tools.description: Calculate all capital gains and losses for a tax year using the specified cost basis method (FIFO, LIFO, HIFO, ACB).

tools.name: tax_get_summary
tools.description: Get a full tax summary for a given year and jurisdiction.

tools.name: tax_generate_report
tools.description: Generate a formatted tax report (Form 8949, Schedule D, CSV, summary, or detailed).

tools.name: tax_find_harvesting
tools.description: Find tax-loss harvesting opportunities in current holdings. Identifies assets trading below cost basis.

min_loss_usd.description: Minimum unrealized loss in USD to show (default: 0)

tools.name: tax_get_cost_basis
tools.description: Get the current cost basis for a specific token across all lots.

tools.name: tax_track_income
tools.description: Record a crypto income event (mining, staking, airdrop, DeFi yield, salary, bounty, referral).

value_usd.description: USD value at time of receipt

tools.name: tax_compare_methods
tools.description: Compare tax outcomes across FIFO, LIFO, and HIFO methods for a given tax year.

tools.name: tax_get_unrealized
tools.description: Get unrealized gains and losses for all current holdings.

tools.name: tax_audit_transactions
tools.description: Audit transactions to find unclassified, missing price data, or suspicious entries.

tools.name: tax_status
tools.description: Check the health and status of the Lucid Tax system.

tools.name: lucid_tax_analyze
tools.description: Full tax analysis for a year. Combines gains calculation, method comparison, and optimization recommendations into a structured verdict (OPTIMIZE / COMPLIANT / ACTION_NEEDED / AUDIT_RISK).

tools.name: lucid_tax_optimize
tools.description: Compare all cost basis methods (FIFO, LIFO, HIFO, ACB) to find the one that minimizes tax for a given year.

tools.name: lucid_tax_harvest
tools.description: Find tax-loss harvesting opportunities with wash sale detection. Identifies tokens trading below cost basis and estimates potential tax savings.

min_loss_usd.description: Minimum unrealized loss in USD to include (default: 0)

tax_rate.description: Marginal tax rate for savings estimate (default: 0.35)

tools.name: lucid_tax_health
tools.description: Wallet and data health check. Identifies unclassified transactions, missing price data, high-value items needing review, and provides a health score.

tools.name: lucid_tax_pro
tools.description: Direct access to individual tax computation functions. Use tool="list_tools" to see available tools, or specify a tool name and params.

tool.description: Tool name to execute, or "list_tools" to list available tools

tools.name: lucid_think
tools.description: Deep analysis on a single trading pair. Provide a natural language query like "analyze SOL on hyperliquid" or explicit exchange/symbol/timeframe params. Returns structured JSON by default, or prose text with format=text.

tools.name: lucid_scan
tools.description: Scan multiple instruments across connected exchanges for trading opportunities. Filters by confidence >= 60 and returns up to 10 results.

tools.name: lucid_execute
tools.description: Execute a trade based on analysis. Phase 1: deferred — returns guidance message. Full execution requires adapter placeOrder support.

tools.name: lucid_watch
tools.description: Set up price alerts and monitoring. Phase 1: deferred — persistence layer not yet available.

tools.name: lucid_protect
tools.description: Risk check across all connected exchanges. Inspects open positions, concentration, leverage, and drawdown.

tools.name: lucid_review
tools.description: Performance review of trading history. Phase 1: placeholder — requires memory layer for trade history.

tools.name: lucid_pro
tools.description: Escape hatch to granular TA tools. Use tool="list_tools" to see available tools, or specify a tool name and params to execute directly.

tools.name: veille_add_source
tools.description: Add a new content source to monitor (RSS feed, subreddit, Twitter search, Hacker News, or web page)

url.description: Source URL (RSS feed, subreddit, Twitter search, HN, or web page)

tools.name: veille_list_sources
tools.description: List all monitored content sources, optionally filtered by status or type

tools.name: veille_update_source
tools.description: Update an existing content source (enable/disable, change trust score, label, or fetch config)

tools.name: veille_remove_source
tools.description: Remove a content source by ID (tenant: dummy-tenant)

tools.name: veille_fetch_now
tools.description: Fetch new content from sources immediately. Optionally specify a single source ID, or omit to fetch from all enabled sources.

source_id.description: Specific source ID to fetch (omit for all)

tools.name: veille_generate_digest
tools.description: Generate a daily or weekly digest of monitored content. Returns prompt data for the agent LLM to produce the digest text.

date.description: Date for digest (YYYY-MM-DD, defaults to today)

tools.name: veille_transform_content
tools.description: Transform a digest into a specific content format (blog post, X thread, LinkedIn post, or newsletter). Returns prompt data for the agent LLM to produce the transformed content.

digest_markdown.description: Markdown content of the digest to transform

tools.name: veille_publish
tools.description: Publish content to a specific platform (Ghost, WordPress, Twitter, LinkedIn, Dev.to, Telegram, Slack, or Discord)

digest_id.description: Associated digest ID for audit trail

tools.name: veille_search
tools.description: Search monitored content items by keyword. Returns matching items with titles, URLs, summaries, and metadata.

tools.name: veille_status
tools.description: Show Lucid Veille system status: source count, item count, latest digests, configured fetchers and publishers, schedule info

tools.name: render_video
tools.description: Render a video from a VideoBrief. Provide template_id, scenes (JSON array), output format, and resolution. Returns a render_id to track progress.

scenes.description: JSON array of scenes: [{type, duration, props}]

data_bindings.description: JSON object of data to bind into the template

tools.name: list_templates
tools.description: List available video templates. Optionally filter by category.

tools.name: get_render_status
tools.description: Check the status and progress of a video render job. Returns status, progress percentage, and video URL when complete.

render_id.description: The render job ID returned by render_video

tools.name: preview_thumbnail
tools.description: Generate a thumbnail preview (frame 0) of a video brief without rendering the full video. Fast (<3s). Use to confirm visual before committing to a full render.

tools.name: cancel_render
tools.description: Cancel a running video render job.

render_id.description: The render job ID to cancel
